About Me

I'm a passionate Computer Science student at Lovely Professional University with a strong focus on Data Science and Machine Learning. I love turning raw datasets into clear, actionable insights that drive real decisions.

My toolkit includes Python, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, Matplotlib, Seaborn, and Power BI. I've built ML pipelines, AI chatbots with Mistral AI, NLP recommendation systems, and financial dashboards.

I've solved 100+ problems on LeetCode and participated in competitive programming contests on CodeChef, sharpening my algorithmic thinking and problem-solving skills.
